steps.title: Create Medical Specialty

steps.title: Create ReqForm
steps.done: ReqForm 'Immunodeficiency - Amedix' already existed (id 73eca2f4-b2f8-455c-8eb2-e25b0d3378a9). Reused existing per user choice; no duplicate created.
steps.note: Existing Name='Immunodeficiency - Amedix' differs from skill naming convention (Name=Amedix) but represents the same Amedix Immunodeficiency reqform.

steps.title: Sync CSV
steps.done: Selected the ReqForm and ran the Sync CSV admin action. Confirmation: 'Syncing process has been started! You can look over it from Sequence Tracker'.

steps.title: Flatten PDF
steps.done: Flattened the source PDF locally with Ghostscript (pdfimage24, 300dpi, 2 pages) to 'Immunodeficiency Panel - Amedix Inc-flatten-pdf.pdf'.

steps.title: Import PDF
steps.done: Uploaded the flattened PDF via Import PDF (Recform=Immunodeficiency - Amedix). Verified the medicalpdf record (Type=Reqform, S3-hosted) attached to the ReqForm.
steps.note: An older Reqform-type PDF 'AMEDIX FINAL - Primary Immunodeficiency Testing Requisition Form.pdf' also remains attached to this recform.

steps.title: Create Form.io order services form
steps.done: Target form '[DEV] [AI] order services Immuno Amedix' already existed and, on full-PDF review, already matched the approved field list: 4 Test Panels (Combined Immunodeficiency, Antibody Deficiency And Cvid, Immune Dysregulation, Adult-onset Severe Inherited Immunodeficiency) with verbatim gene lists, full Clinical History section, and the 3 fixed fields (Additional Clinical Context, Relevant Diagnosis via dataSrc:custom, Instructions). Kept as-is (cleaner than the manual reference, which carries a stray hidden PGx medications datagrid). Linked schema URL into ReqForm Metadata order_form_link.
steps.note: SCID 'NOT FOR ELDERLY PATIENTS' panel dropped per user approval (matches manual reference). Schema URL: https://dev-rce-dashboard.firebaseio.com/forms/-Ov98tTzVFWPM0Sq3DhI/schema.json

steps.title: Final confirm
steps.done: Reviewed the finished ReqForm change page (Description, Medical speciality Immunodeficiency-Genetic, Lab Amedix, Metadata order_form_link). User confirmed it looks correct.
